name: Tito's Handmade Vodka 1.75L (80 Proof)
description: Tito’s Handmade Vodka is an unflavored, low-calorie vodka that is naturally gluten-free with zero carbs and zero sugars. Crafted in old-fashioned pot stills, inspired by the distillation methods of fine single malt scotches and high-end French cognacs. Distilled six times for an impeccably clean finish.

name: Ketel One Vodka 1.75L (80 Proof)
description: Ketel One Premium Vodka - Inspired By Small Batch Craftsmanship. A crisp, sophisticated vodka with a long finish.

name: Tito's Handmade Vodka 750ml (80 Proof)
description: The same high-quality Tito’s in a 750ml bottle. Naturally gluten-free, crafted in Austin, Texas from corn and distilled six times in pot stills.

name: Jameson Irish Whiskey 750ml (80 proof)
description: Light floral fragrances and rich vanilla spices balance out the sweetness. Jameson is perfect straight up or in any whiskey cocktail.

name: Bombay Sapphire Gin 1.75L (94 Proof)
description: Extraordinary smoothness and perfectly balanced taste. Discover a world-class gin with 10 hand-selected botanicals from around the globe.

name: Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey 1.75L (80 Proof)
description: Charcoal mellowed drop by drop through 10 feet of sugar maple charcoal, then matured in handcrafted barrels. A smooth, best-in-class whiskey.

name: Clase Azul Reposado Tequila 750ml (80 Proof)
description: Masterfully aged for eight months in American whiskey casks. Imparts unique hazelnut and vanilla flavors with an exceptionally smooth finish. Iconic hand-painted decanter.

name: Casamigos Blanco Tequila 750ml (80 Proof)
description: A crystal-clear tequila with crisp notes of citrus, vanilla, and sweet agave. Long, smooth finish with vibrant grapefruit and fruit-forward flavors.

name: Don Julio 70 Cristalino Tequila 750ml (80 Proof)
description: The world’s first añejo claro tequila. Robust character with highlights of vanilla, honey, and toasted oak. Combines the smoothness of a blanco with the complexity of an añejo.

name: Don Julio 1942 Anejo Tequila 750ml (80 Proof)
description: Celebrated in exclusive bars worldwide. Handcrafted in small batches, aged for at least two and a half years. Rich complexity with notes of caramel, toffee, and vanilla.

name: Bulleit Bourbon Whiskey 1.75 L (90 Proof)
description: Especially high rye content gives it a bold, spicy character with a clean finish. Gentle spiciness and sweet oak aromas with tones of maple and nutmeg.

name: Jameson Irish Whiskey 1.75L (80 Proof)
description: Silky smooth Irish whiskey known for its balance and accessibility. Floral nose with spicy wood and sweet sherry notes.

name: Bulleit Bourbon Whiskey 750ml (90 Proof)
description: Small batch Kentucky bourbon with a high rye content. Subtly spiced and oaky with a long, dry, satiny finish.

name: Don Julio Blanco Tequila 750ml (80 Proof)
description: Fresh citrus taste and sweetness. Meticulously distilled in copper-lined pot stills to ensure a distinctive, crisp flavor profile.

name: Tanqueray London Dry Gin, 1.75 L (94.6 Proof)
description: Expertly crafted recipe with juniper, coriander, angelica, and licorice. A perfectly balanced, award-winning spirit with a dry finish.

name: Grey Goose Vodka 750ml (80 Proof)
description: Unrivaled quality and taste. Clear, fresh, and elegant floral aroma with a subtle citrus note and a silky, smooth finish.

name: Aperol Aperitivo Liqueur 750ml (22 Proof)
description: The perfect aperitivo with a bright orange color and a unique bitter-sweet taste from a secret recipe of oranges, herbs, and roots.

name: Cointreau Orange Liqueur Triple Sec 750ml (80 Proof)
description: Iconic orange liqueur essential for margaritas. Heart of 500+ celebrated cocktails with exceptional citrus aroma and fresh taste.

name: Patron Silver Tequila 750ml (80 Proof)
description: Crystal clear, ultra-premium tequila. Smooth and sweet with a light pepper finish and aromas of fruit and citrus.

name: Skyy Vodka 1.75L (80 Proof)
description: Gluten-free, quadruple distilled and triple filtered. Clean, crisp taste that is perfect for mixing or on the rocks.

name: Baileys Original Irish Cream Liqueur 750 mL (34 Proof)
description: World's number one Irish cream liqueur. Perfect blend of fine Irish whiskey, dairy cream, chocolate, and vanilla flavors.

name: Maker's Mark Bourbon 750ml (90 Proof)
description: Full-flavored, yet remarkably easy to drink. Subtly woody with flavors of vanilla, caramel, and fruit, crafted with red winter wheat.

name: Hennessy VS Cognac 750ml (80 proof)
description: Aged oak flavor with fruity notes. Bold and robust, ideal for enjoying straight or in sophisticated cocktails.

name: Casamigos Reposado Tequila 750ml (80 Proof)
description: Honey-colored with rich aromas of caramel and cocoa. Silky texture with a smooth finish, aged for seven months in premium oak.

name: LALO Blanco Tequila 750ml (80 Proof)
description: Truest and purest spirit on Earth. No barrels or additives, presenting the taste of the finest agave from the Jalisco highlands.
